title: 1993 FSO Polonez Caro MR'93 (LP new)
scope: Visual model identity, author, publication metadata and displayed license label
limitations: The page displays Sketchfab Free Standard rather than a Creative Commons license; do not treat the raw GLB as redistribution-cleared.

title: Sketchfab License Agreement
scope: Restrictions on standalone or extractable redistribution of material licensed under Sketchfab standard terms
limitations: Terms may change and purchase-specific rights can differ; this inventory is a project risk note rather than legal advice.

title: FSO Polonez
scope: MR'93 chronology, engine families, five-speed applications, selected final-drive values and production-year cross-check
limitations: Secondary compilation. Its 1500 X 4.3, VM diesel 3.727 and later Kombi 3.9/4.3 final-drive claims require primary FSO or period-catalog confirmation before final physics calibration.

title: FSO Polonez
scope: Independent language-edition cross-check for the 1993–1997 Caro MR'93 generation boundary
limitations: Secondary cross-check only; does not resolve application-specific gearbox ratios.

title: PSA XUD engine
scope: XUD9A displacement, naturally aspirated indirect-injection architecture and Polonez application
limitations: Engine-family source rather than an FSO application sheet; final powertrain values need an FSO-specific primary source.

title: Polski Fiat 125p
scope: Predecessor 1500 four-speed ratios: 3.75 / 2.30 / 1.49 / 1.00; reverse 3.87; final drive 4.10
limitations: Useful only as a predecessor baseline. The period Polonez road test says second and third were changed, so this set must not be copied wholesale into Polonez specs.

title: Polski Fiat 125p
scope: Late 125p adoption of the Polonez powertrain and 1988–1991 five-speed availability
limitations: Confirms family sharing but does not publish the numerical five-speed ratios.

title: KFT fuhr Polonez 1500
scope: Original Polonez drivetrain comparison with 125p; confirms revised second- and third-gear ratios for better tractive-force continuity
limitations: The bibliographic citation identifies Kraftfahrzeugtechnik 9/1978 pages 281–284. The complete scan still needs retrieval to capture numerical ratios and measurement tables.

title: KFT Kraftfahrzeugtechnik scan collection
scope: Archive lead for individual scanned KFT issues including the September 1978 Polonez road test
limitations: The stack is not directly machine-readable in the current research environment; issue and page extraction remain pending.

title: FIA Historic Database
scope: Official index entries for FSO Polonez 125 PN homologation 656 and FSO Polonez homologation 657
limitations: The forms may contain both series-production and optional competition ratios. Retrieve and classify the base form and extensions before using any numbers for a road car.

title: POLONEZ Budowa Eksploatacja Naprawa
scope: Potential primary-like workshop source for gearbox construction, tooth counts, ratios and axle applications
limitations: Book by Edward Morawski, WKŁ. A complete accessible copy has not yet been obtained; no ratio is attributed to it in the dataset.

title: Polonez Caro MR'93 powertrain reconstruction
scope: Wide-track MR'93 overlap windows and conservative six-candidate catalog boundary
limitations: Research seed only. Exact gearbox codes, forward and reverse ratios, final drives, masses, tire sizes and month-level transitions remain unresolved.
